query: CREATE TABLE `collaborators` (`id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `establishmentId` int NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `passwordHash` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `permissions` json NOT NULL, `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `lastLoginAt` timestamp NULL, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`));
